name: Depths of Despair
short_description: Welcome to Depths of Despair, a thrilling solo/multiplayer game where you must fight off waves of enemies to survive for a set amount of time. With each wave, the enemies become stronger and more challenging to defeat. Can you and your team hold out long enough?
detailed_description:
Depths of Despair is a solo/group survivor-like, roguelite game. You simply use the WASD or arrow keys to move around and automatically slay enemies with abilities doing the work.

- Play solo or up to 4 players by hosting games online or via LAN.

- Survive waves of enemies and bosses for 10-20 minutes on each map. Gain experience, unlock abilities, and upgrade them.

- Conquering maps will unlock new, harder ones.

- Collect gold and unlock new characters with new starting abilities.

- Steam achievements!

If you purchase the game, please leave a review, I'd love to hear your thoughts!
